title: remove Anthropic fallback + set real LLM_HOST_IP
description:
## Summary

- **No Anthropic fallback**: removed all `workspace-*-fallback` models and `fallbacks:` block from litellm-config — chat-class requests return 503 when Ollama is down
- **LLM_HOST_IP set to `10.10.0.3`** (PK-Desktop, wg-mesh) in both prod env files
- **Sealed secrets regenerated** for mentolder + korczewski; also adds missing `VOYAGE_API_KEY` to korczewski knowledge-secrets
- **ANTHROPIC_API_KEY** stays optional in the website deployment for pre-existing `claude.ts` meeting insights — but is no longer required and not in the router

## Test plan

- [x] `task env:validate:all` — passes
- [x] Both `task env:seal ENV=mentolder` and `task env:seal ENV=korczewski` succeeded
- [ ] `./tests/runner.sh local FA-32` through `FA-37` + `NFA-11` — post-bootstrap
